summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for ModulAI app. All 15 backend API tests passed (100% success rate). Frontend UI tests verified admin login, voucher management with toggle/delete functionality, generate page with multi-mode selection, and 3-step wizard. All requested features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored into modular files (routes/auth_routes.py, routes/generate_routes.py, routes/admin_routes.py, routes/payment_routes.py). Voucher endpoints use query params for creation (POST /api/admin/vouchers?code=X&discount_type=Y&discount_value=Z). Generate endpoints call real Gemini API (need 120s timeout). Token balance after tests: ~9990 tokens.

tested_features.notes: Login with super admin credentials working, returns JWT token
Returns list of all vouchers with is_active status
Creates voucher using query params, returns voucher with ID
Toggles is_active field, verified with GET after update
Permanently deletes voucher, verified 404 on missing ID
Returns list of token packages with id, name, price, tokens
Generated RPP + Rubrik documents, tokens deducted correctly
Modul Ajar output includes Daftar Pustaka (bibliography) section
Output format: All questions FIRST, then KUNCI JAWABAN, then PEMBAHASAN at end
Voucher table shows toggle switch (Status) and delete button (Aksi column)
Checkbox enables multi-mode, token cost shows correctly (e.g., '2 dokumen dipilih = 2 token')
